view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Deposit collection vs full payment', but the evidence does not provide a clear outcome or confirmation of the scenario's behavior. While the expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there is no supporting evidence that directly addresses this requirement. The lack of concrete traces or snapshots to audit the coverage further contributes to the inconclusiveness of the validation.
